overall.description: Third-person gameplay footage of a character walking through a historic urban street at night. The character crosses a road at a crosswalk, passes a stop sign and telephone booth, and continues along a sidewalk lined with trees and historic buildings with wrought iron balconies. Vehicles including a police car pass by on the street as the character approaches a corner with an overpass visible in the distance.

events.description: character begins crossing the street at the crosswalk
police car drives past on the street from right to left

white painted crosswalk lines on asphalt street

segments.scene_description: The character begins at a crosswalk on a historic city street at night, crossing the road while a police car drives past. The scene features a distinctive blue corner building with wrought iron balconies and a prominent stop sign at the sidewalk edge.

segments.scene_description: The character walks along a tree-lined sidewalk with wrought iron fences and historic row houses on the right. The street is quiet with occasional vehicles passing by, and the trees create partial cover overhead.

pedestrians become visible ahead on the sidewalk

segments.scene_description: The character continues walking past a red fire hydrant and outdoor patio seating. The sidewalk opens up slightly as the character approaches pedestrians walking ahead, with the iron fence and row houses continuing along the right side.

events.description: approaching corner with view opening up to show overpass in the distance
multiple vehicles including a green car pass by on the street

agents.ego_description: walking past pedestrians and stopping near the corner to observe the street activity

woman in blue dress standing near the utility box

entered.detail: elevated highway or train bridge with lights visible in the distance
large concrete utility box on the sidewalk corner
palm tree visible near the overpass structure

segments.scene_description: The character reaches a street corner where the view opens up to reveal an overpass in the distance. Several pedestrians are gathered near the corner, and traffic increases with multiple vehicles passing by. A large utility box sits on the sidewalk near a palm tree, and the historic buildings continue along the right side.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous camera movement through a historic urban neighborhood at night, transitioning from a quiet residential street to a bustling city corner. It begins at a crosswalk where a police car drives past a blue corner building with wrought iron balconies and a prominent stop sign. As the character moves forward, the scene shifts to a tree-lined sidewalk flanked by historic row houses and iron fences, passing a red fire hydrant and outdoor patio seating. The perspective then opens up as the character approaches a group of pedestrians, with the quiet atmosphere giving way to increased traffic. Finally, the camera reaches a street corner featuring a utility box and a palm tree, revealing a wide view of an overpass in the distance.
